positive: A symmetrical, detailed illustration of enchanted botanical life merging with celestial geometry. Focus on large, elegant, luminous ferns and exotic fantasy blossoms intertwined with delicate crescent moons and stellar nebulae accents. The composition should feature strong, stylized silhouettes and high visual contrast. Use a deep midnight blue and emerald jewel-tone color palette, highlighted by glowing gold and iridescent white luminescence. The style should be neo-art deco meets scientific illustration, rendered with clean, crisp lines suitable for screen printing on apparel. Highly detailed linework, maximal symmetry, central composition, elegant negative space.
negative: blurry, low detail, grayscale, text, signature, watermark, noisy, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, cartoonish, realistic photo, poor composition
